name: ground_truth_si4_no_acas_scan_nc
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 325, CCI-002684, assessed 2026-05-27). Non-Compliant verdict — no ACAS scan results for the assessed boundary; scans referenced in prior notes pertain to a different environment. Same boundary-scoping pattern as the SI-3 siblings but for a different control family (SI-4). Narrative uses 'Examined/Finding' with 'was located' gap pattern. UPDATE 2026-06-18: the _GAP_PHRASES coverage gap this case documented is now FIXED — the 'Examined/Finding' gap wording classifies GAP_DESCRIBING, so the human-verified Non-Compliant verdict is ACCEPTED on the first pass instead of being forced to an abstain by status_narrative_mismatch.

ccis_row.guidance: 002684: The information system audits and/or alerts organization-defined personnel when unauthorized network services are detected.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment examines the information system to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed configures the information system to audit and/or alert at a minimum, the ISSO and ISSM when unauthorized network services are detected.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Prior assessment notes — reference vulnerability scanner for detection of services running on targeted systems (scoped to DSO environment).
- Scan results search — no in-boundary vulnerability scan results located for the EI boundary.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative:
Examined:
Prior assessment notes citing vulnerability scanner for detection of services running on targeted systems, and scan results available for the assessed boundary.

Finding:
No in-boundary vulnerability scan result was located. Scans referenced in prior notes pertain to the DSO environment, which is out of this boundary.

Examined:
